title: Ayurgreen Hospital | Integrated Ortho-Neuro Rehabilitation & Ayurveda Hospital in Kerala
desc: Ayurgreen Hospital is India's leading integrated ortho-neuro rehabilitation center combining robotics, physiotherapy, Ayurveda, speech therapy, occupational therapy, and holistic care for stroke, Parkinson's, spinal cord injury, and neurological recovery.

headings.text: Redefining the Standard of Global Neuro Rehabilitation

content: Ayurgreen Hospital stands at the apex of medical innovation, merging precise robotic interventions with ancient, profound Ayurvedic science. For over a decade, we have challenged the conventional limits of recovery. By introducing India's first fully robotic integrated neuro pathway, we have successfully treated over 10,000 catastrophic cases from more than 50 countries. Our philosophy is simple: Recovery should not be a fragmented journey. By bringing world-class robotic engineers, elite physiotherapists, leading neurologists, and traditional Ayurveda scholars into a singular, cohesive ecosystem, we maximize neuroplasticity and systemic regeneration.

title: Acupuncture Rehabilitation & Care | Ayurgreen Hospital
desc: Fine-needle neural stimulation to reduce chronic pain states, restore local blood circulation, and activate sensory pathways.
content: Fine-needle neural stimulation to reduce chronic pain states, restore local blood circulation, and activate sensory pathways. At Ayurgreen Hospital, we provide an integrated rehabilitation approach for Acupuncture designed to maximize functional recovery and systemic rejuvenation. By combining state-of-the-art robotic assistive technologies, evidence-based physiotherapy, and authentic traditional Kerala Ayurveda, our multidisciplinary team addresses both structural and biochemical pathways to promote deep neural healing. Our clinicians, therapists, and Ayurvedic scholars collaborate daily to adjust therapies, ensuring safe progression, spasticity reduction, and optimal functional autonomy. Time-tested organic formulations and specialized warm oil sudations acting directly on motor system biology.
